name: operating-graph
description: Design, run, inspect, and safely reorganize adaptive agent operating graphs.

interface.shortDescription: Engineer and run adaptive agent organizations.
interface.longDescription: Transforms complex goals into typed, executable agent graphs with shared state, evidence, verification, bounded runtime restructuring, and human authority controls.
defaultPrompt: Design an operating graph for this goal.
Run this goal as an adaptive agent graph.
Inspect and improve the current operating graph.
